what_it_does: Vitest test suite for the codex-support module that checks the minimum supported Codex CLI version, parsing of CLI version strings, numeric semantic-version comparison, and whether a version meets the support floor.
observations: compareSemver is tested for equal, greater-than, and less-than numeric ordering
versionMeetsMinimum returns true for the floor and above, false below
The suite groups all cases under a single describe block named 'Codex support floor'
standouts: Hard-codes and tests the production support floor at '0.130.0'
Tests parseCodexCliVersion against two distinct CLI naming prefixes ('codex-cli' and 'codex')
compareSemver is validated numerically rather than lexically
conventions: Co-located test file mirrors the source module under test
Uses mixed matcher styles: toBe, toBeGreaterThan, toBeLessThan
concerns: Only covers clean major.minor.patch version strings; no prerelease, build metadata, or malformed inputs are tested
The minimum version is pinned in the test, so any legitimate floor bump must also update this test expectation
parseCodexCliVersion behavior for strings with extra tokens or varying whitespace is not exercised
notes: A regression-style Vitest suite that locks the supported Codex CLI floor to 0.130.0 and exercises the version parsing/comparison helpers.
questions: How does parseCodexCliVersion handle whitespace, extra words, or missing version components?
Does compareSemver support prerelease or build-metadata suffixes?
What does versionMeetsMinimum do with undefined or non-numeric version strings?
Is MIN_CODEX_VERSION consumed by feature-gating logic elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the describe title and tests focus on the Codex support floor and the helpers that enforce it.
apparent_themes: Defensive parsing of external tool output
intention_signals: To establish a clear, tested minimum Codex CLI version and to ensure the system can reliably parse and compare the installed CLI's version before enabling Codex-dependent functionality.
contribution: A set of regression tests that codify the minimum Codex CLI version and the expected behavior of the version parsing and comparison utilities, preserving the version-compatibility contract.
summary_for_embedding: This Vitest file in company/recollection/test/codex-support.test.ts tests the codex-support module's minimum-version constant, CLI version string parser, numeric semver comparator, and minimum-version acceptance predicate.
intention_for_embedding: It was written to pin and guard the lowest supported Codex CLI version and to verify the helper functions that detect whether an installed CLI meets that floor.
